rules.rule_text:
rule KURTON_APT1
{
	meta:
		author = "AlienVault Labs"
		info = "CommentCrew-threat-apt1"

	strings:
		$s1 = "Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; MSIE8.0; Windows NT 5.1)" wide ascii
		$s2 = "!(*@)(!@PORT!(*@)(!@URL" wide ascii
		$s3 = "MyTmpFile.Dat" wide ascii
		$s4 = "SvcHost.DLL.log" wide ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
